description: 權限與角色 — isAdmin、role、permissions flag — Hard Positive
generation_guidelines: Generate privilege escalation indicators. Cover: isAdmin: true, role: superuser/admin/root, permissions with wildcards (Allow:*:*), canDelete/canEdit flags set to true, access_level: full, policy statements granting broad access, sudo/NOPASSWD configs, authorization bypass indicators. Paths: root.user.permissions, root.auth.roles, root.config.rbac, root.app.acl.

examples.text: Path: root.api.user | Key: is_admin | Struct: Leaf | Val: "true"
Path: root.config.iam.policy | Key: statement | Struct: Leaf | Val: "Effect:Allow,Action:*,Resource:*"
